title: Change default settings according to profile (currency, date format etc)
excerpt:
Hello :wave: wish we could set the default settings at workspace level and have the individual profiles be able to reset it as needed.

posts.author: wenceslyne (Lyn Ong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello wish we could set the default settings at workspace level and have the individual profiles be able to reset it as needed.

It would be especially helpful for columns to have the local currency and date format. At the moment, everything appears in USD currency and and US date which takes me extra steps each time I create a new cost related board or column.

If not an auto feature based on region, a pop-up that asks you at sign up stage would be equally awesome.

Cheers!
